productDisplayName: Lucera Women Set of Two Silver Ring
description: Style NoteAdd a sophisticated polish to your minimalist look this season with this lucera ring. Styled to refine your ensemble, don't save it just for the special dates - wear this with your denim and tee staples too. Up the style bar with this lovely piece and style it with tonal accessories.   Product DetailsSilver band with a square shaped stone cluster at the centreTwo strands of encrusted white stones along the sides of the centre  stoneMaterial and CareSilver, CZ diamondsWipe with a cotton swab to remove dust
